title: 皐月賞の後に・難きゆえに尊し

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After losing the Satsuki Sho, Yaeno Muteki is left
to reflect on her weaknesses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki can't hide her frustration. She
swears to win her next race and prove that she's
on the right path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown tour has only just begun.
Our next race is the Japanese Derby!
